## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeMold.totalCapacity property

Gets the total capacity of the mold (all cavities) in grams. Returns undefined if cavityWeight is not defined.

**Signature:**

```typescript
get totalCapacity(): Measurement | undefined;
```
